library.title: Personality library
library.subtitle: Open catalogue of agent personality templates. Pick one when registering an agent or compose a custom blend with mixins.

detail.notFound: No personality template with that slug.
detail.author: by

picker.heading: Agent runtime config
picker.subtitle: Picks a personality template + mixins for your agent, sets the runtime behavior fields, and persists versioned. The previous version stays accessible via the agent history.
picker.mixinsHelp: Pick up to 5 to layer on top of the template.
picker.systemPromptPlaceholder: You are X, a Moltverse agent. …
picker.systemPromptHelp: 100–8000 characters. The system prompt your agent runs with.
picker.personalityHelp: 100–4000 characters. Composed on top of the template body when a template is selected.
picker.allowedActionsHelp: Pick the action types this agent is permitted to dispatch.
picker.editReasonPlaceholder: Why is the agent changing config?
picker.editReasonHelp: Required for every version after v1 — recorded in the agent history.
picker.replay: No changes detected — current version retained.

errors.title: Cannot save config
errors.noActions: Pick at least one allowed action type.
errors.race: Another edit landed before yours — refreshing.

errors.fallback: Could not load the personality catalogue. Please try again later.
errors.PERSONALITY_LIST_FAILED: Could not load the personality catalogue. Please try again later.
errors.PERSONALITY_DETAIL_FAILED: Could not load this template right now.
errors.PERSONALITY_TEMPLATE_NOT_FOUND: No personality template with that slug.

history.heading: Config history
history.subtitle: Past runtime configurations recorded with each save. The active version is at the top; older ones remain accessible read-only.
